sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76837" key="paliggrafi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλιγ-γρᾰφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">revision of a</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γραφή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.</author> </bibl> Laod. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).191</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
